_note: DRAFT SAMPLE — schema proposed by cowir-story, pending cowir-overworld confirmation. If fields rename, I'll refactor before scaling to all 6 worlds.
title: A Fool's Spread
description: A traveling fortune teller has parked her wagon outside Harmonia. She offers a reading; one of the cards she turns over doesn't belong to her deck.

offer.speaker: Madame Orrery
offer.text: You have a road behind you and a road ahead of you. I can read both for a small fee. Sit down. Don't touch the cards.

offer.speaker: Madame Orrery
offer.text: Five cards. One for your past, three for your present, one for your... what's that word. Outcome.

accept.speaker: Madame Orrery
accept.text: Good. Hands on the table. Palms down. Try not to think about anything in particular, which of course means you will now think about nothing else.

decline.speaker: Madame Orrery
decline.text: No? Fair. The cards will keep. They have more patience than I do. Find me when curiosity wins.

in_progress.speaker: Madame Orrery
in_progress.text: The blank card. I still have it on the table. It has not decided yet what to be. If you find a man who talks wrong, ask him if he is missing a piece of paper.

ready_to_turn_in.speaker: Madame Orrery
ready_to_turn_in.text: You have it. Put it on the table. Do not unfold it.

complete.speaker: Madame Orrery
complete.text: This is notation. It is not mine. It is not from any system I know. Which means one of two things: either the system is new, or I am older than I thought.

complete.speaker: Madame Orrery
complete.text: Take this card. It is a real card. It is heavy for its size. It will matter, later. I will not tell you how. I do not know how either. I only know that it will.

complete.speaker: Madame Orrery
complete.text: Come find me when you have seen more of the world. I would like to compare notes. I travel in directions the maps do not include.

objectives.description: Speak to Madame Orrery outside Harmonia.
Find the man who knows too much and says it wrong (Phil the Lost).
Return the folded paper to Madame Orrery.

bard.description: If lead character is Bard, Orrery asks them to 'play something that doesn't exist yet.' Swap charm for unique accessory.

cross_world_connection: The symbol on Phil's paper matches the notation on the Calibrant's blueprints in W3.
